name: rBeams
author: UberMetroid
description: Sweeping vertical colored spotlights in purple, blue, and pink. Now features a live dynamic OS name and kernel subtext logo.

name: rBhop
author: UberMetroid
description: Cyberpunk Neon Pink and Cyan Hacker TUI with scrolling live Bhop game panel and full system diagnostics (including GPUs and monitors).

name: rFire
author: UberMetroid
description: Majestic Doom fire simulation sweeping upward, reacting to system load with a live dynamic OS logo.

name: rFireworks
author: UberMetroid
description: Cozy city skyline silhouette with warm lit windows and exploding fireworks illuminating the live OS logo.

name: rLife
author: UberMetroid
description: Conway's Game of Life simulated on a grid with nebula trails, interacting with the live dynamic OS logo.

name: rMatrix
author: UberMetroid
description: Dense Matrix-style falling digital rain using system environment variables and live system data, over the dynamic OS logo.

name: rParty
author: UberMetroid
description: Rave party simulation featuring twinkling background stars, a disco ball, and the live dynamic OS logo.

name: rPour
author: UberMetroid
description: Waterfall cascade of characters (including live system data) assembling the dynamic OS logo and kernel.

name: rUnstable
author: UberMetroid
description: A dynamic OS logo exploding outward into chaotic particles (with new explosion types and side effects) and snapping back.

name: rFireflies
author: UberMetroid
description: Harmonious pulsing Lissajous particle orbits with glowing wireframe connector lines, dynamically adjusting to system DWM colors.
